stage_identity.evidence: Teen stage Byte with gangly limbs and big expressive eyes visible. Proportions match canonical teen form with small rounded body and characteristic gangly limbs.

pixel_style.evidence: Clean pixel art style maintained with dithered shading and readable silhouette. No painterly or photoreal artifacts detected.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Morning lighting applied - golden-pink tones visible in scene. Byte shown awake at desk with eyes open, no Z's present. Transition from night sleeping to morning readiness achieved.

artifact_free.evidence: No garbled text, floating glyphs, malformed anatomy, duplicated parts, or smeared objects detected. Image renders cleanly at 512x512.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Trophy shelf visible above desk with exactly one golden trophy positioned on left side and exactly one green plant on right side. Food bowl present on floor to right of desk. All props show clear spacing with no overlap or clipping.

anchors_present.evidence: All scene anchors present: wooden desk with oversized laptop centered, Chicago skyline visible through window behind, Byte positioned at desk in foreground.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: Morning scene with golden-pink lighting matches time_of_day=morning and is_sleeping=false state. Byte appears refreshed and hopeful, matching ecstatic mood.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Mode is normal, not reground. This check is not applicable for normal mode edits.
